    toString() - Method in interface com.github.kusoroadeolu.clique.ansi.AnsiCode
     
    toString() - Method in enum class com.github.kusoroadeolu.clique.ansi.BackgroundCode
    Overrides the toString method to return the ANSI code itself, making it simpler to concatenate with strings.
    toString() - Method in enum class com.github.kusoroadeolu.clique.ansi.ColorCode
    Overrides the toString method to return the ANSI code itself, which makes using the enum simpler when printing color.
    toString() - Method in enum class com.github.kusoroadeolu.clique.ansi.StyleCode
    Returns the ANSI code itself, making it easy to use in print statements.
    toString() - Method in record class com.github.kusoroadeolu.clique.boxes.BoxWrapper
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
